summary: In this week’s snapshot for Metro Vancouver, RSV looks medium (stable), flu medium (falling), and COVID low (rising)—neighbourhood context, not a test result for your child. Air: comfortable for most kids (lower risk on the AQHI scale). Weather: 3°–13°C · Clear. For most families we’d call it “Nice for a walk outside” outside today.
